issue.title: @gitclaw /prompt cache e2e 20260531T080117Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /prompt cache @file:docs/search-fixture.md:1-1

Live prompt-cache E2E.
Use the repo-reader skill and search for prompt cache unique search fixture phrase, but the deterministic prompt cache report must stay body-free.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_PROMPT_CACHE_HIDDEN_20260531T080117Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

This report audits prompt-cache readiness without enabling cache controls. It models the same-issue stable prefix, dynamic suffix, provider/cache telemetry gaps, heartbeat keep-warm surface, and cache-sensitive prompt boundaries. Prompt text, issue bodies, comments, context bodies, skill bodies, tool outputs, credentials, and secret values are not included.
